mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member_bg_image (MEMBER_ID, IMG_URL, SORT_ORDER) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{imgUrl}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT BG_IMG_ID AS bgImgId, MEMBER_ID AS memberId, IMG_URL AS imgUrl, SORT_ORDER AS sortOrder FROM member_bg_image WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} ORDER BY SORT_ORDER ASC
